description: Unit: HTML parser extracts data:image base64 payloads from single tag
Unit: HTML parser extracts multiple data:image payloads and preserves deterministic ordering
Unit: malformed data:image payload is skipped and does not throw processing-failing error
Unit: non-image data URLs are rejected by embedded extraction rules
Unit: oversized embedded image payload is skipped by existing max-size policy
Unit: cid references in HTML map only to matching inline MIME parts
Unit: unreferenced inline CID MIME parts are skipped
Unit: deterministic synthetic embedded attachment ID generation is stable across retries
Unit: deterministic embedded filename generation produces sanitized, extension-appropriate names
In-app integration: new-ticket inbound path invokes embedded-image processing for extracted images
In-app integration: reply path invokes embedded-image processing for extracted images
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates external_files row with expected mime and size
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates documents row with expected metadata
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates ticket document_associations row
DB integration guard: duplicate embedded-image processing does not create duplicate file/document/association rows
DB integration guard: embedded-image failure is recorded and ticket/comment flow remains successful
Unit: Gmail source-message method returns raw MIME bytes for valid message id
Unit: Microsoft source-message method returns raw MIME bytes for valid message id
Unit: MailHog source-message path returns MIME bytes when raw source is available
Unit: MailHog source-message fallback generates deterministic RFC822 payload when raw source is absent
Action integration happy-path: process_original_email_attachment uploads .eml and creates external_files/documents rows
Action integration happy-path: process_original_email_attachment associates .eml document to ticket
Action integration guard: duplicate process_original_email_attachment invocation is idempotent
Action integration guard: provider source-message retrieval failure records failed status without duplicate artifacts
In-app integration: new-ticket path persists original .eml exactly once per email
In-app integration: reply path persists original .eml exactly once per email
In-app integration guard: .eml persistence failure does not block ticket creation in new-ticket flow
In-app integration guard: .eml persistence failure does not block comment creation in reply flow
Schema contract test: inbound email payload schema accepts isInline/content fields needed by inline-image processing
Schema contract test: inbound payload schema changes remain backward compatible with existing provider payloads
E2E: inbound email with HTML data:image results in image document visible in Ticket Documents
E2E: inbound email with CID-referenced inline image results in image document visible in Ticket Documents
E2E: inbound email creates .eml document visible in Ticket Documents for both new and reply paths
E2E guard: duplicate inbound deliveries/retries do not duplicate embedded image or .eml documents
Integration: IMAP webhook route returns success quickly after auth/validation and lightweight in-app dispatch (direct or app-local in-process worker) without performing byte persistence inline
Integration guard: IMAP webhook request with invalid/missing secret is rejected before any in-app dispatch work
Integration: per-attachment cap enforcement skips oversized attachment payloads at IMAP ingress with structured skip reason
Integration: total attachment byte cap enforcement truncates/skips excess artifacts while keeping message processing active
Integration: attachment-count cap enforcement limits processed artifacts per message and records deterministic skip reasons
Integration: raw MIME cap enforcement skips .eml persistence when raw source exceeds limit without failing ticket/comment flow
Schema contract: IMAP webhook payload includes rawMimeBase64 and attachment content/isInline/contentId/id/name/contentType/size fields
E2E: IMAP inbound with regular attachment bytes in payload creates storage-backed ticket document
E2E: IMAP inbound with referenced CID and data:image payload creates image documents only for referenced embedded images
E2E: IMAP inbound with rawMimeBase64 persists one deterministic original-email-*.eml document on ticket
Integration: async per-message artifact handling runs sequentially (or configured bounded concurrency) and does not fan out unbounded attachment work
E2E guard: over-limit artifacts are skipped with recorded reasons while ticket/comment creation still succeeds
